title: “Hooliganism”: Calcutta HC Bar Association condemns attack on SIR judicial officers, suspends lawyer
description: The Calcutta High Court Bar Association has strongly condemned the recent attack and intimidation of judicial officers engaged in the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls in West Bengal.In a resolution passed at an urgent general body meeting on April 6, the Association expressed strong concern over reports that seven judicial officers, including three women judges, were allegedly held hostage for about nine hours in Malda’s Kaliachak area on April 1 while performing their duties.
